briefdescription.para: Performs an input operation for an 8-bit memory location by reading from the specified address and returning the value read from that address.

parameterdescription.para: contains the address to perform the input operation at.

simplesect.para: The value read from the specified input address.

briefdescription.para: Performs an input operation for a 16-bit memory location by reading from the specified address and returning the value read from that address.

parameterdescription.para: contains the address to perform the input operation at.

simplesect.para: The value read from the specified input address.

briefdescription.para: Performs an input operation for a 32-bit memory location by reading from the specified address and returning the value read from that address.

parameterdescription.para: contains the address to perform the input operation at.

simplesect.para: The value read from the specified input address.

briefdescription.para: Performs an output operation for an 8-bit memory location by writing the specified value to the the specified address.

parameterdescription.para: contains the address to perform the output operation at.
contains the value to be output at the specified address.

briefdescription.para: Performs an output operation for a 16-bit memory location by writing the specified value to the the specified address.

parameterdescription.para: contains the address to perform the output operation at.
contains the value to be output at the specified address.

briefdescription.para: Performs an output operation for a 32-bit memory location by writing the specified value to the the specified address.

parameterdescription.para: contains the address to perform the output operation at.
contains the value to be output at the specified address.

detaileddescription.para: Typically correlates to the width of the address bus.

parameterdescription.para: contains the value to be converted.
contains a pointer to the location to put the converted value.
contains the value to be converted.
contains a pointer to the location to put the converted value.

briefdescription.para: Performs an input operation for a 16-bit memory location by reading from the specified address and returning the byte-swapped value read from that address.

parameterdescription.para: contains the address to perform the input operation at.

simplesect.para: The byte-swapped value read from the specified input address.

briefdescription.para: Performs an input operation for a 32-bit memory location by reading from the specified address and returning the byte-swapped value read from that address.

parameterdescription.para: contains the address to perform the input operation at.

simplesect.para: The byte-swapped value read from the specified input address.

briefdescription.para: Performs an output operation for a 16-bit memory location by writing the specified value to the the specified address.

detaileddescription.para: The value is byte-swapped before being written.

parameterdescription.para: contains the address to perform the output operation at.
contains the value to be output at the specified address.

briefdescription.para: Performs an output operation for a 32-bit memory location by writing the specified value to the the specified address.

detaileddescription.para: The value is byte-swapped before being written.

parameterdescription.para: contains the address at which the output operation has to be done.
contains the value to be output at the specified address.
